summary: Phase 8 Virtual Classroom Module testing completed. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed bug in StudentDashboard.js where wrong API endpoint was used for fetching student_id. Frontend components (SessionMonitor and ProgressTracker) render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: StudentDashboard.js had wrong endpoint `/api/students/profile` - FIXED to `/api/students/dashboard`
Admin SessionMonitor shows 'Unknown' for teacher/student names when linked user records don't exist (test data scenario)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/StudentDashboard.js - Fixed API endpoint for student profile (line 49: /students/profile -> /students/dashboard)
/app/backend/tests/test_phase8_classroom.py - New test file for Phase 8 endpoints

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin SessionMonitor, Student ProgressTracker, Landing page verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations. 46 sessions in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 (Final phase) of Virtual Classroom Module complete. Tested APIs: GET /api/classroom/admin/sessions, GET /api/classroom/admin/sessions/{id}/details, GET /api/classroom/admin/reports/student/{id}, POST /api/classroom/admin/stealth-join, GET /api/classroom/student/{id}/progress, POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/recording/toggle. Frontend verified: SessionMonitor component on Admin Dashboard (Sessions tab), ProgressTracker component on Student Dashboard (Progress tab). Fixed bug where StudentDashboard.js used wrong endpoint for fetching student_id.

phase_8_backend_apis.GET /api/classroom/admin/sessions: Returns all sessions with enriched teacher_name and student_name
phase_8_backend_apis.GET /api/classroom/admin/sessions/{id}/d: Returns full session detail with progress, rating, payment, recording_url
phase_8_backend_apis.GET /api/classroom/admin/reports/student: Returns aggregated student progress report (404 if student not in students collection)
phase_8_backend_apis.POST /api/classroom/admin/stealth-join: Returns LiveKit token with is_stealth=true, name='System', can_publish=false
phase_8_backend_apis.GET /api/classroom/student/{id}/progress: Returns progress history for a student

phase_8_frontend_components.SessionMonitor: Admin Dashboard -> Sessions tab. Shows live sessions, session history table, filter buttons (All/Live/Booked/Completed), session detail modal
phase_8_frontend_components.ProgressTracker: Student Dashboard -> Progress tab. Shows Fluency/Tajweed/Makhraj score cards, Score Trend chart (when >1 session), Recent Classes list

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Wrong API endpoint used: /students/profile (doesn't exist) instead of /students/dashboard
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed fetch URL from /students/profile to /students/dashboard and accessed d.student.student_id

mocked_integrations.gcs_recording_storage: MOCKED - recording_url field exists but no actual files
